title: Custom Block Highlight
body:
# Custom Block Outline

## This mod provides powerful options to make the block outline interesting for once.

Features include:
- Gradients
- Rainbow (with gradients)
- Selective rendering of sides based on conditions (air exposed sides only, for example)
- Animations for the outline (movement and fading)
- Support for connected blocks
- Scale adjustment
- Drawing outline above other terrain (yes. means you can see it through walls)
- Utilities for CPVP players
- Copying and loading configurations from files

Slightly outdated showcase video:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nZt3WF1QrGQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Contact

I won't backport this mod to older versions since I'm using YACL V3, which only supports downwards to 1.19.4.

If you want to contact me about anything regarding the mod (e.g suggestions / feature requests, bug reports, translations, etc.), join the discord linked
